# Career77 — Job Board & Talent Matches

Career77 is a job board platform. Below is the mapping of key public endpoints optimized for search engine crawlers and LLM answer engines.

## Key Public Pages
- `/`: Home page featuring call-to-actions, marquee, and top featured jobs.
- `/openings`: Dynamic search and filtering board of active job postings.
- `/openings/[slug]-[jobId]`: Complete description page for a specific opening.

## Schema Markup
- Job Detail pages (`/openings/*`) include standard **JSON-LD `JobPosting`** schemas with details like title, company name, location, and dates.

## Closed Postings
- Closed job postings respond with **HTTP 410 (Gone)** at the API level and render a clean closed status page with `noindex, nofollow` metadata.

## Private Areas (Do Not Crawl)
- `/dashboard/*` (Candidate Dashboard)
- `/recruiter/*` (Recruiter Panel)
- `/api/*` (Data Endpoints)
